case_title: PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY VS. ARIEL THOMAS ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-23-2019 CONTINUED TO DEC-11-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-28-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-11-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, ARIEL $4,729.69 PRINCIPAL, $317.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,046.69, SEE SCANNED DOC
